prompts.narration_snippet: This isn't just a theory
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows steps boldly through a doorway, leaving behind a dim, dusty library crammed with ancient leather-bound books and cobwebs, and entering a gleaming, ultra-modern neuroscience laboratory bathed in cool white and electric-blue light. Holographic monitors, sleek metallic consoles, and glowing specimen displays line the walls. The character's massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, wide with awe and wonder, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and an expression of delighted curiosity. The teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm bounces on its back mid-step. The contrast between the sepia dusty past and the vivid luminous future is dramatic and exciting. no text
